speaker: speaker1
text: I give up ! I simply can't learn French !

speaker: speaker2
text: Why do you say that ? I think you're making a lot of progress .

speaker: speaker1
text: No , I'm not . I try and try and I still can't speak it very well .

speaker: speaker2
text: Learning any language takes a lot of effort.But don't give up . Why don't we practise those dialogues together ?
